reviews.comment:
Insólito, no se puede llenar el tanque, queda hasta un cuarto sin completar. Todos los pisos donde se estaciona al lado de los surtidores tienen desnivel. Terrible.

(Translated by Google)
Unbelievable! You can't fill the tank; there's even a quarter of it left. All the floors where you park next to the pumps are uneven. Terrible.

reviews.comment:
Pésima, pésima atención. uno de los playeros ni te miraba a la cara al responder, y la mal educada que estaba en el turno el día sábado 18 de feb a las tipo 18 hs aprox  en el kiosco adentro un desastre!!. Le pedimos la llave para el bañoy todo de mala gana ,haciendo caras la sobradora infumable. Mil protocolos por un baño que seguramente ni limpia bien, ( siendo que habíamos cargado combustible, un de las exigencias ) para colmo habló tan rápido que no se le entendió. Y cuando   encaro para el lado incorrecto me grita " te dije que era afuera"... Le dejé la llave y me fui. Quizás no todos/as atiendan así ahí, pero para mí fue Pesimo!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible, absolutely terrible service. One of the attendants wouldn't even look you in the eye when answering, and the rude woman on duty at the kiosk inside on Saturday, February 18th, around 6 pm, was a disaster! We asked her for the key to the bathroom, and she did it all reluctantly, making faces—she was incredibly rude and unbearable. A million protocols for a bathroom she probably doesn't even clean properly (especially since we had filled up with fuel, which is one of the requirements). To top it all off, she spoke so fast we couldn't understand her. And when I headed in the wrong direction, she yelled at me, "I told you it was outside!" I left her the key and walked out. Maybe not everyone there treats customers like that, but for me, it was awful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobmZHekJ3EAE
